SIGN IN TO GENERATE
Image generation runs through your Beast Mode account.
Sign in (free) to unlock the multi-model engine.
⊙ IMAGES SAVED AUTOMATICALLY Every image you generate is saved permanently to your account and synced when you sign in. Want a second copy in your own cloud? Connect Google Drive in Settings for optional backup. Your Dropbox sync covers prompts & library data.

SIGN IN TO UPSCALE
Upscaling runs through your Beast Mode account.
Sign in (free) to unlock the resolution engine.
⊙ IMAGES SAVED AUTOMATICALLY Every upscale is saved permanently to your account and synced when you sign in. Want a second copy in your own cloud? Connect Google Drive in Settings for optional backup. Your Dropbox sync covers prompts & library data.

// UPSCALER

RUNWARE RESOLUTION ENGINE
Select images from the bar at the bottom of the screen.
MODEL
TARGET RESOLUTION
Output is rendered toward this megapixel count (capped at 8 MP).
OUTPUT RESOLUTION
AI-guided enhancement — the model regenerates at the target resolution using your image as a reference. Results may differ from the source.
UPSCALE FACTOR
GUIDING PROMPT (optional)
NEGATIVE PROMPT (optional)

SEED

Jobs run on the server and finish even if you refresh, lose connection, or sign out. Finished images are saved to your library automatically.

// SETTINGS

Account

Profile
Profile image
Click the image to upload one or choose from your library.
Shown on your account. Defaults to the first part of your email.
Account Storage
Your generated and upscaled images are saved to your account automatically. When storage is full, the oldest images are removed first.
Loading storage usage…

Tokens

LIMELIGHT ACCOUNT
You're charged at provider cost. Tokens are metered in 0.1 increments, rounded up to the nearest $0.001 per generation.
Balance
Sign in to see your token balance and activity.
BALANCE: —
Tokens are spent on image generation and priced per model and resolution. Every charge, refund, and grant is recorded on your account; charges link to the saved image in your library.
Model Prices
LIMELIGHT RATES
Tokens charged per generation, by model.
BUY TOKENS
QTY 1 = 200 tokens · $2.00
STRIPE Secure payment. Tokens added instantly after checkout.

Cloud Sync

SYNC SERVICE
Connected
One-time recovery of images saved to your Drive "Beast Mode" folder. Safe to run again — already-imported images are skipped.
Remove library entries whose image no longer exists anywhere. You'll see a count and confirm before anything is deleted. Prompt-only entries are never affected.
Not connected
⬡
Dropbox connected
Not connected

Appearance

Light Mode
Switch to light colour scheme
Interface Colour
Choose your accent colour. Applies across the whole interface.

Accessibility

Display
Light Mode
Switch to light colour scheme
High Contrast
Boost text and border contrast for readability
Text Size
Scale interface text. Applies across the whole app and is saved with your synced settings.
M is the default. L and XL increase legibility; S is more compact.
Keyboard Shortcuts
1 / 2 / 3Switch to Image Gen / Upscaler / Library 4 / 5 / 6Switch to Beast Mode / Prompt Lab / Queue GGenerate / run in the current mode RRandomise (Beast Mode / Prompt Lab) ?Open this shortcuts reference Ctrl + ZUndo formula change (Lab) Ctrl + YRedo formula change (Lab) Ctrl + EnterCopy current prompt to clipboard Ctrl + Shift + RRandomise (Lab / Beast Mode) Ctrl + Shift + SSave current prompt to Library EscapeClose any open modal or panel
Single-key shortcuts are ignored while typing in a text field.

Advanced

My AI Models
Custom models saved for reuse when tagging prompts.
Style Presets
Manage built-in and custom style presets.
Data & Export
⚠ No cloud sync active. Prompts are stored in this browser only, and only your last 5 generated images are kept online — older images are removed and browser storage can be wiped at any time. Connect Google Drive or Dropbox in the Cloud Sync section above to keep all your prompts and images safe.
Tutorials
Replay the Prompt Lab orientation and the first-run setup checklist. Completion is saved with your synced data, so dismissed tutorials stay dismissed across devices and cache clears.
Particle Usage
Your most-used particles across all Lab sessions. Top 20 by use count.
Share Target Diagnostic
Shows the URL the app was last launched with — use after testing the share target.
Send Feedback
Found a bug? Have a suggestion? We'd love to hear from you.
Opens your email app pre-filled with app details.
Sends to [email protected]

YOUR STYLE, YOUR EXPERTISE, YOUR PROMPT.
An account unlocks image generation and saves your settings. After signing in you can connect Google Drive or Dropbox to keep your prompts and images safe.
⚠ KEEP YOUR IMAGES SAFE
Without cloud sync, your prompts live in this browser only and only your last 5 generated images are kept online — older ones are removed. Connect Google Drive or Dropbox to keep everything saved and synced across devices.
